Alabama.public_processes: Contact your local county Department of Human Resources office or the state adoption unit. Home study and training required for foster-to-adopt.
Alabama.private_processes: Search licensed private agencies or attorneys. Home study still required.
Alabama.waiting_notes: Use AdoptUSKids to search and filter by Alabama. Not all waiting children are photolisted.

Alaska.public_processes: State-administered system. Contact the Office of Children's Services for foster-to-adopt information and home study.
Alaska.private_processes: Search licensed private agencies or attorneys. Home study still required.
Alaska.waiting_notes: Use AdoptUSKids national search filtered by Alaska.

Arizona.public_processes: Contact the Department of Child Safety for foster care and adoption. Home study required.
Arizona.private_processes: Search licensed private agencies or attorneys. Home study still required.
Arizona.waiting_notes: Arizona has additional heart gallery resources in some areas.

Arkansas.waiting_notes: Use AdoptUSKids to search Arkansas waiting children.

California.public_processes: County-administered system. Contact your local county child welfare office. Home study required. Priority often given to relatives and current foster parents.
California.private_processes: Search licensed private agencies through state resources.
California.waiting_notes: Large foster care system with many sibling groups and older youth. Some counties have local photolists.
